xt\":\"\"},{\"anchor\":\"\",\"function\":\"build_scheduler\",\"new\":\"\",\"old\":\"\",\"op\":\"replace_function\",\"source\":\"def build_scheduler(optimizer: optim.Optimizer, steps_per_epoch: int):\\n    if not USE_LR_SCHEDULE:\\n        return None\\n    total_steps = TRAIN_MAX_STEPS if TRAIN_MAX_STEPS is not None else steps_per_epoch * 100\\n    return optim.lr_scheduler.CosineAnnealingLR(optimizer, T_max=total_steps)\\n\",\"text\":\"\"}],\"primary_mode\":\"summaries\",\"rationale\":\"The script is budget-limited to 256 fixed steps, so the baseline scheduler logic is mismatched because it decays over 100 epochs.
